section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Remove the unused import for ArraySchema to clean up the code.
Add a class-level Javadoc comment to identify the author.
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.human_impl: Added '/** @author Eazy Bytes */' before the class definition

section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate native generator configuration in favor of standard JPA auto-generation strategy.

section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0 to align with the new Java version and framework features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.

README.md.general_idea: Refine the main title to emphasize Spring Boot alongside Docker and Kubernetes.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header from 'Master Microservices with Java, Spring, Docker, Kubernetes' to 'Master Microservices with Spring Boot, Docker, Kubernetes'

README.md.general_idea: Switch the hero image source from an external Udemy S3 bucket to a local GitHub repository path.
README.md.human_impl: Updated image URL from udemy-image-web-upload.s3.amazonaws.com to github.com/eazybytes/microservices/blob/main/Microservice.png

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite the list of course sections to reflect updated curriculum structure and naming conventions.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old section list (e.g., 'Section 2 - Microservices & Spring Cloud') with new list (e.g., 'Section 2- Building microservices using Spring Boot')

README.md.general_idea: Add and update external resource links to include new tools like OpenTelemetry, Jib, and specific documentation pages.
README.md.human_impl: Added links for Spring Boot, Model Mapper, MapStruct, OpenTelemetry, Google Jib, and others while removing or updating existing ones.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify the Maven build image command by removing the test skip flag and adding Jib support.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'mvn spring-boot:build-image -Dmaven.test.skip=true' to 'mvn spring-boot:build-image' and added 'mvn compile jib:dockerBuild'

README.md.general_idea: Update Docker commands to include version tags and add commands for specific services like MySQL, Redis, and Keycloak.
README.md.human_impl: Added ':s4' tags to image names and added run commands for MySQL, Redis, and Keycloak containers.

README.md.general_idea: Introduce a new section documenting Apache Benchmark commands for load testing.
Update Kubernetes command examples to reflect current deployment names and add PVC management commands.
README.md.human_impl: Changed deployment names to 'gatewayserver-deployment' and added 'kubectl get pvc' and 'kubectl delete pvc' commands.
